top_signals.title: China coal mine blast tests limits of Xi’s energy security push
top_signals.summary: Friday night's blast, which left at least 82 dead, is already prompting a response which belies the scale of the coal mine's operation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Starmer’s lame duck status risks policymaking paralysis in U.K.
top_signals.summary: Starmer's political support has collapsed in the wake of a devastating round of local elections for his governing Labour Party this month.
